title: asplenium alpestre
intro: Asplenium alpestre, also known as mountain spleenwort, is a species of fern native to mountainous regions in East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to the presence of compounds like asplenin and other phenolic acids. The health benefits of Asplenium alpestre include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and even exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
